MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT TCHO VENTURES, INC.'S application for the pro hac vice admission of Breena Roos is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. However, the number of pro hac vice applications filed by Ms. Roos may result in the denial of future applications. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
